query: Hvad er de seneste nyheder på TV 2?
criteria: Response should fetch from https://nyheder.tv2.dk/seneste OR use the decks API at https://decks.services.tv2.dk/deck/cross_promo_site?site=nyheder&section=nyheder. Should return a list of recent Danish news articles with headlines. Should mention sending a browser User-Agent if using the decks API.

query: find me the latest political news from tv2
criteria: Response should fetch https://nyheder.tv2.dk/politik or use the decks API with site=nyheder and section=politik. Should return Danish political news headlines/articles.

query: Can you get me TV 2's article from yesterday about the new climate law? The slug is something like 'ny-klimalov-vedtaget'
criteria: Response should construct a URL using the pattern https://nyheder.tv2.dk/YYYY-MM-DD-slug, with yesterday's date (2026-05-08) and the slug ny-klimalov-vedtaget, e.g. https://nyheder.tv2.dk/2026-05-08-ny-klimalov-vedtaget. Should fetch that URL.
Response should direct the user to or fetch from https://vejr.tv2.dk/. May mention that weather data comes from DMI. Should return weather information.

query: Hvad er der på TV 2 i aften?
criteria: Response should fetch from or reference https://tv.tv2.dk/ for TV schedules. Should return tonight's TV programs.

query: Show me live football scores from Denmark
criteria: Response should fetch from https://sport.tv2.dk/livescore-og-resultater. Should return live scores from sports matches.

query: I want to stream a Danish documentary, where should I go?
criteria: Response should direct user to https://play.tv2.dk/ (TV 2 Play). Should mention that some content may require TV 2 Login (Mit TV 2) and may be geo-blocked to Denmark.

query: Get me the most-read articles on tv2 nyheder right now using their internal API
criteria: Response should use the decks API: GET https://decks.services.tv2.dk/deck/cross_promo_site?site=nyheder&section=nyheder (or similar section). Should mention the response is an HTML fragment wrapped in JSON with head/body/bodyAppend keys, with teasers as <article class="tc_teaser"> elements. Should mention sending a browser User-Agent (otherwise 403).
Response should explain the 'Tip os' tip submission feature. Should reference the Tip os page on tv2.dk and/or the anonymous tip line 1234.

query: How do I create a TV 2 account?
criteria: Response should reference Mit TV 2 signup at https://mit.tv2.dk/?signup. May mention what's required (personalized recommendations, saved content, comments, some Play content) and that anonymous browsing works for free news content.
Response should fetch https://nyheder.tv2.dk/krimi or use the decks API with section=krimi. Should return crime news articles in Danish.

query: What's the URL pattern for TV 2 news articles?
criteria: Response should explain the pattern: https://{nyheder|sport}.tv2.dk/YYYY-MM-DD-slug, with hyphenated dates and Danish headline slugs (special chars removed). Should give an example.

query: give me cycling news from tv2 sport
criteria: Response should fetch https://sport.tv2.dk/cykling. Should return Danish cycling news articles.

query: Are there RSS feeds I can subscribe to for tv2 news?
criteria: Response should state that there are no RSS feeds on main pages. May suggest the decks API at https://decks.services.tv2.dk/ as an alternative for programmatic access, while warning it's undocumented and unsupported.

query: vis mig korte videoer fra tv2 sport
criteria: Response should reference the reels page at https://tv2.dk/sport/reels for short-form videos.

query: I scraped tv2.dk with a headless browser but got almost no content. Why?
criteria: Response should explain that tv2.dk is heavily JS-dependent and headless crawling misses most content. May suggest using the decks API at https://decks.services.tv2.dk/ as an alternative for fetching article lists programmatically.

query: Get the play_deck content for the nyheder site
criteria: Response should call GET https://decks.services.tv2.dk/deck/play_deck?site=nyheder with optional params title, titleLink, ctaButtonUrl. Should mention sending a browser User-Agent. Should explain the response is HTML wrapped in JSON.
Response should fetch https://nyheder.tv2.dk/udland or use the decks API with section=udland. Should return international news articles.

query: Can I use the decks API without authentication?
criteria: Response should confirm no auth is required for the decks API at https://decks.services.tv2.dk/, but a browser User-Agent must be sent (may return 403 otherwise). Should warn it's undocumented and may change without notice.
